title: Mir Approval Schema
description: User approval gate. Created when a run enters NEED_APPROVAL state. Approval policy depends on risk_level.

approval_id.description: ULID identifier for this approval request.

status.description: Approval lifecycle status. DENIED=user rejected. DELAYED=user deferred. EXPIRED=timeout.

risk_level.description: Risk classification driving the auto_policy decision.

auto_policy.description: Policy object controlling timeout behaviour and default action.

on_timeout.description: Action when timeout_minutes elapses without user reply.

oneOf.description: Legacy string form for backward compatibility.

requested_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when approval was requested.

decided_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when status changed from PENDING. Required if status != PENDING.

decided_by.description: User identifier (e.g., Discord user_id or email). Optional.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp after which PENDING auto-converts to EXPIRED.

summary.description: Human-readable description of what is being approved (diff preview, side effect summary, etc.).

details_ref.description: Path or id pointing to full approval context (full diff, plan, etc.).

discord_chat_id.description: Discord channel/thread chat_id where the approval request was sent.

discord_message_id_request.description: Discord message_id of the approval request message (ULID or Discord snowflake).

discord_message_id_response.description: Discord message_id of the user's reply (set after user replies).

denial_reason.description: Reason provided by user when status=DENIED.

delay_reason.description: Reason provided by user when status=DELAYED.
